Q-Asker(이하 \"서비스\")는 이용자의 개인정보를 소중히 보호하며: Q-Asker (hereinafter "Service") values the protection of users' personal information and complies with applicable laws.
You may request to view, correct, or delete your personal information.
Other information is promptly destroyed once the purpose is fulfilled.
However, it may be provided if required by law.
문의 시: 이메일 주소, 문의 내용: When inquiring: Email address, inquiry details
Inquiries can be submitted to the contact below.
This policy may be changed as the service improves, and changes will be announced.
Some tasks may be outsourced within the scope necessary for service operation.
서비스 이용 시 자동 수집: IP 주소, 브라우저 정보, 접속 로그: Automatically collected during service use: IP address, browser info, access logs
업로드한 파일: 퀴즈 생성 목적의 처리 과정에서 일시적으로 저장: Uploaded files: Temporarily stored during quiz generation processing
Uploaded files are automatically deleted within 24 hours after processing.
In principle, we do not provide information to third parties.
When outsourced, we manage and supervise in accordance with applicable laws.
